encounters.hazard: Falling icicles triggered by sound

pickup.name: Vial of Pure Sunlight
pickup.effect: Deals high radiant damage and dispels magical shadows

encounters.trigger: Unlocking the Iron Portcullis, which opens the way to the Sunken Archives

encounters.hazard: Corrosive ink pools on the floor

pickup.name: Scroll of Shattering Wind
pickup.effect: Creates a gust that breaks crystalline structures and armor

encounters.trigger: Lighting the three cursed braziers, which reveals the descent to the Obsidian Pit

encounters.hazard: Spitfires of superheated volcanic ash

pickup.name: Ice-infused Heartstone
pickup.effect: Temporarily coats the user's spells in frost and lowers high temperatures

encounters.trigger: Shattering the central pillar, which awakens the guardian in the Inner Sanctum

boss.name: Malakor the Inferno Lord
boss.victory_condition: Freeze Malakor's core with the Ice-infused Heartstone and shatter him with a pyromancy blast

level.objective: Navigate the Whispering Catacombs to find and neutralize Malakor the Inferno Lord before he unleashes a wave of molten destruction.
level.reward: The Crown of Cinders, granting permanent fire resistance and amplified fire spell damage.

encounters.hazard: Sneezewort Pollen Clouds

pickup.name: Sparkling Honeycomb
pickup.effect: Sticky distraction lure

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Bramble-Badger reveals a hidden path of stepping stones leading deeper into the meadow toward a giant hollow oak.

encounters.hazard: Falling Acorns

pickup.name: Screechy Whistle-Berry
pickup.effect: Produces a high-frequency whistle when crushed

encounters.trigger: Rolling the beetle aside reveals a burbling creek bed that flows directly into the central blossom circle.

encounters.hazard: Slippery Moss Stones

pickup.name: Glow-in-the-Dark Catnip
pickup.effect: Highly hypnotic scent to feline-type creatures

encounters.trigger: The Otter splashes away in defeat, leaving behind a key made of woven vines that unlocks the gate to the Great Catnap Garden.

boss.name: Barnaby the Over-Slept Panther
boss.victory_condition: Lure Barnaby back to his giant velvet cushion and put him to sleep with the hypnotic scent of the Glow-in-the-Dark Catnip.

level.objective: Navigate the whimsical meadows and soothe the grumpy, sleep-deprived guardian panther so you can access the sacred fairy glade.
level.reward: The Legendary Feather Wand and the title of Honorary Meadow Whisperer

level.setting: The Corrupted Crypt of the Sunken Cathedral

encounters.hazard: Crumbling stone pillars and floor pressure plates

pickup.name: Holy Water Flask
pickup.effect: Deals massive radiant damage to undead and burns away shadow barriers

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel shatters the seal on the Cathedral Cloister door, revealing the path forward.

encounters.hazard: Vile corruption pools that deal continuous acid damage

pickup.name: Aegis Rune
pickup.effect: Creates a temporary shield that absorbs dark magic attacks

encounters.trigger: The death of the Shadow Creeper triggers a massive tremor, opening the heavy iron gates to the Sanctum.

encounters.hazard: Falling debris and unstable, collapsing masonry

pickup.name: Sunfire Elixir
pickup.effect: Imbues the user with blinding solar energy, completely neutralizing dark armor

encounters.trigger: The Gargoyle falls from its perch and smashes through the floor, plunging the player directly into the Boss Chamber.

boss.name: Arch-Lich Malakar
boss.victory_condition: Consume the Sunfire Elixir to melt Malakar's necrotic shield, then strike his exposed heart with the Blessed Greatsword.

level.objective: Purge the ancient cathedral of its necrotic plague and defeat Arch-Lich Malakar to restore the holy light.
level.reward: The legendary Suncrest Shield and the title of Holy Champion of the Order.

level.setting: The Whispering Labyrinth of Shifting Mirrors

encounters.hazard: Shattering glass floor panels triggered by illusion magic

pickup.name: Prism of Refracted Truth
pickup.effect: Unveils hidden structures and blinds shadow-based entities

encounters.trigger: A secret doorway of light is revealed in the mirror wall, leading down to the Abyssal Gallery

encounters.hazard: Suffocating darkness that drains player health over time unless illuminated

pickup.name: Vial of Luminescent Essence
pickup.effect: Temporarily coats the player's weapon with pure celestial light

encounters.trigger: The arachnid's death scream shatters a massive glass barrier, exposing the entrance to the Astral Conservatory

encounters.hazard: Falling star-shards that disrupt illusions and stun the player

pickup.name: Essence of the Weaver's Eye
pickup.effect: Allows the user to see and manipulate the true core of illusion-born deities

encounters.trigger: The Warden's collapsing core opens a spatial rift directly to the inner sanctum of the Arch-Deceiver

boss.name: Malakor, The Arch-Deceiver
boss.victory_condition: Reveal Malakor's true physical form among a dozen shifting mirages and shatter his core

level.objective: Navigate the labyrinth, survive the deadly mirages, and retrieve the stolen Crown of Whispers
level.reward: The title of Master Weaver and the legendary Sigil of Infinite Reflections

level.setting: The Whisperwood Sanctuary, a sunlit forest clearing filled with glowing flora and ancient stone ruins.

encounters.hazard: Thorns of Melancholy

pickup.name: Sun-Kissed Pollen
pickup.effect: Cures corruption and glows in deep shade

encounters.trigger: A beam of light pierces the canopy, illuminating a path deeper into the Whispering Grove.

encounters.hazard: Gloom-spores

pickup.name: Springwater Chalice
pickup.effect: Restores 50 health and purifies dark water

encounters.trigger: The trickling sound of a nearby waterfall grows louder, revealing the entrance to the Pool of Harmony.

encounters.hazard: Deep-water Currents

pickup.name: Dewdrop Crystal
pickup.effect: Reflects pure starlight to dispel ancient illusions

encounters.trigger: The water clears, revealing a hidden stone bridge that leads directly to the Shrine of the Elder Tree.

boss.name: The Corrupted Guardian Spirit
boss.victory_condition: Cleanse the Guardian Spirit by using the Dewdrop Crystal to reveal its inner purity, freeing it from the corruption.

level.objective: Restore peace to the Whisperwood Sanctuary by cleansing the corrupted Guardian Spirit at the heart of the forest.
level.reward: The Mark of the Forest Envoy, granting eternal safe passage and friendship with all woodland creatures.

level.setting: The Molten Fracture, a crumbling obsidian citadel floating over an active volcano

encounters.hazard: Falling volcanic ash and unstable crumbling floor tiles

pickup.name: Vial of Liquid Ice
pickup.effect: Temporarily coats weapons with a freezing element

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Imp causes the bridge to collapse entirely, forcing the player to slide down a volcanic chute into the Obsidian Forge.

encounters.hazard: Periodic bursts of pressurized superheated steam

pickup.name: Rune of Shattering
pickup.effect: Causes the next melee attack to emit a shockwave that bypasses heavy armor

encounters.trigger: The death throes of the Basilisk shatter the forge pressure valves, blowing open a sealed iron vault door.

encounters.hazard: Leaking liquid energy pools that combust when stepped on

pickup.name: Anvil-Forged Bastion Shield
pickup.effect: Enables the player to block and redirect kinetic energy blasts

encounters.trigger: The Golem's self-destruction detonates the vault floor, plunging the player directly into the core of the volcano where the Core-Bound Behemoth rests.

boss.name: Ignis the Core-Bound Behemoth
boss.victory_condition: Redirect Ignis's volcanic beam using the Anvil-Forged Bastion Shield to shatter his exposed magma heart.

level.objective: Quell the unstable elemental core of the volcanic citadel and survive the descent.
level.reward: The Heart of Flame artifact, granting permanent fire immunity and explosive physical attacks.

level.setting: The Whispering Crypts of the Forgotten Dynasty

encounters.hazard: Grave Dust Mists

pickup.name: Essence of Decay
pickup.effect: Infuses weapons with rot, bypassing physical shields.

encounters.trigger: Placing the Spectral Watcher's skull on the altar opens the locked iron gates leading to the Sunken Catacombs.

encounters.hazard: Toxic Sludge Pools

pickup.name: Phantasmal Lantern
pickup.effect: Reveals invisible targets and dispels illusions.

encounters.trigger: Purging the ghoul's nest drains the sewage, revealing a steep spiral staircase down to the Tombs of the Unburied.

encounters.hazard: Falling Masonry and Spikes

pickup.name: Vial of Holy Ashes
pickup.effect: Deals massive damage to high-tier undead shields.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the stalker releases its soul to shatter the protective barrier surrounding the Inner Sanctum.

boss.name: Arch-Lich Malakar
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the Lich's phylactery using the Holy Ashes and claim his crown.

level.objective: Navigate the eerie crypts, bypass the ancient guardians, and destroy the Arch-Lich Malakar to claim his forbidden magic.
level.reward: The Grim Grimoire of Souls, granting the ability to summon elite skeletal knights.

level.setting: The Whispering Wastes of Oros, a decaying petrified forest under a dying crimson sun

encounters.hazard: Corrosive dust storms that reduce visibility and drain health over time

pickup.name: Phial of Sun-Bleached Tar
pickup.effect: Coat arrows to deal sticky, high-temperature fire damage

encounters.trigger: After defeating the Husk, its crumbling remains trigger a seismic tremor that opens a fissure leading to the Salted Flats

encounters.hazard: Hidden quicksand sinkholes that trap the player and deal crush damage

pickup.name: Barbed Grappling Hook
pickup.effect: Allows rapid traversal to high ground and pulling armor plates off heavy targets

encounters.trigger: With the Serpent slain, the player must use the Barbed Grappling Hook to scale the canyon wall into the Obsidian Spires

encounters.hazard: Shattering glass-sharp stone protrusions that fall from the canopy

pickup.name: Void-Infused Prism Arrow
pickup.effect: Converts kinetic weapon damage into piercing dark-matter energy

encounters.trigger: Destroying the Sentry shatters the ancient seals guarding the entry to the Core Chamber where the Rift Weaver awaits

boss.name: The Rift Weaver
boss.victory_condition: Pierce the Rift Weaver's core using Void-infused shots while dodging disintegrating cosmic rifts

level.objective: Traverse the desolate ruins of Oros and banish the Rift Weaver to seal the spreading void decay
level.reward: The Weaver's Heart, an artifact granting the player permanent phase-dash abilities and the title of Void Ranger

level.setting: An abandoned, depressurizing deep-space research vessel drifting near a collapsing star.

encounters.hazard: Leaking Liquid Nitrogen Pipes

pickup.name: Corrosive Acid Vial
pickup.effect: Melts heavy security locks and dissolves organic armor.

encounters.trigger: Decompression in Hydroponics forces the bulkhead doors to seal, routing the player into the dark Ventilation Shafts.

encounters.hazard: Flickering exposed power conduits sparking randomly.

pickup.name: High-Frequency Sonic Emitter
pickup.effect: Emits a concentrated sound wave that disrupts synthetic neural networks.

encounters.trigger: A structural collapse inside the ventilation shaft drops the player down into the Main Reactor Core chamber.

encounters.hazard: Superheated steam jets erupting from the floor valves.

pickup.name: Magnetic Disruptor Charge
pickup.effect: Emits a localized electromagnetic pulse designed to disable heavy shielding.

encounters.trigger: The reactor core reaches critical mass, triggering emergency alarms and locking down the central chamber where the AI Core resides.

boss.name: The Rogue AI Frame (Aegis-9)
boss.victory_condition: Disable the shield using the Magnetic Disruptor Charge, then overload the main core with the Arc-Welding Laser.

level.objective: Navigate through the dying ship's sectors, bypass malfunctioning security systems, and disable the corrupted main AI to prevent the ship from self-destructing.
level.reward: The Master Overdrive Keycard and the engineer's freedom from the derelict ship.

level.setting: A decaying temporal research facility floating in the silent void of the End of Time.

encounters.hazard: Intermittent localized time freezes that trap the player for 3 seconds.

pickup.name: Decayed Tachyon Battery
pickup.effect: Modulates weapon output to emit concentrated fast-forward energy.

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Decayed Tachyon Battery into the auxiliary terminal overloads the security grid, unlocking the door to the Grand Archive.

encounters.hazard: Falling bookshelves crumbling into micro-black holes.

pickup.name: Singularity Core
pickup.effect: Allows the player to create localized gravity wells that slow down rapid projectiles.

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Archivist Drone releases its core data, activating the gravity-lift to the Reactor Core.

encounters.hazard: Venting superheated temporal plasma leaks.

pickup.name: Chronos Keycard
pickup.effect: Grants absolute bypass authority to temporal locks and shields.

encounters.trigger: Using the Chronos Keycard on the central blast doors exposes the core containment chamber where the Temporal Overseer resides.

boss.name: The Temporal Overseer
boss.victory_condition: Use the Chronos Keycard to shut down the Overseer's temporal shield generator, then destroy its exposed core with the Temporal Rift Staff.

level.objective: Navigate the desolate, decaying facility to shut down the rogue temporal engine before it collapses the timeline.
level.reward: The Epoch Engine Blueprint and the title of Master of the Void.

level.setting: An unstable, exploding antimatter refinery orbiting a collapsing star.

encounters.hazard: Intermittent superheated plasma jets erupting from floor grates

pickup.name: Superconducting Magnetic Coil
pickup.effect: Modifies weapon to discharge high-frequency EM pulses

encounters.trigger: A structural explosion blasts open the heavy pressure doors, revealing the decaying transit tubes.

encounters.hazard: Failing gravity fields tossing debris violently through the air

pickup.name: Liquid Nitrogen Coolant Tank
pickup.effect: Enables cryogenic elemental storm attacks

encounters.trigger: The transit tube ruptures completely, sucking the player down into the central containment vault.

encounters.hazard: Rising pools of active liquid antimatter flooding the lower floor

pickup.name: Hyper-Charged Battery Pack
pickup.effect: Overcharges storm abilities to 300% efficiency

encounters.trigger: The Behemoth crashes through the structural support pillars, exposing the core chamber where the AI resides.

boss.name: The Malfunctioning Core AI 'Aegis-9'
boss.victory_condition: Inject the hyper-charged battery pack into the AI central mainframe while dodging laser grids.

level.objective: Navigate the collapsing orbital refinery to overload and purge the corrupted core AI before total station destruction.
level.reward: The legendary Stormbringer Catalyst, unlocking the final cosmic elemental subclass tier.

level.setting: An abandoned, derelict space station drifting on the edge of a dying star, shrouded in cosmic dust and eerie silence.

encounters.hazard: Slick cryogenic fluid leaks that impair movement.

pickup.name: Overcharged Capacitor
pickup.effect: Modifies weapon with an overcharged energy surge.

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Overcharged Capacitor into the terminal opens the security doors leading to the Auxiliary Reactor.

encounters.hazard: Exposed high-voltage power conduits.

pickup.name: Polymorphic Cyber-Virus
pickup.effect: An experimental code sequence designed to disrupt core programming.

encounters.trigger: Injecting the Polymorphic Cyber-Virus into the security hub unlocks the emergency elevator to the Command Deck.

encounters.hazard: Intermittent decompression vents blasting freezing oxygen.

pickup.name: Thermal Singularity Core
pickup.effect: Emits an intense localized heat blast that can melt shielding.

encounters.trigger: Overloading the bridge power grid with the Thermal Singularity Core forces the main hangar door open, revealing the final boss chamber.

boss.name: C.O.R.T.E.X. Defense Network
boss.victory_condition: Detonate the Thermal Singularity Core inside the central processing unit to melt its impenetrable energy shields and destroy its neural core.

level.objective: Navigate through the decaying space station to purge the rogue AI and secure the station's ancient database.
level.reward: The Legendary Schema for the Starforge Relic, elevating the Artificer's crafting capabilities to cosmic levels.

level.setting: An abandoned deep-space research vessel drifting in the shadow of a dying star

enemy.name: Phase-Stalker Drone
enemy.weakness: Chronoshitft Mono-Filament Blade temporal disruption attacks

encounters.hazard: Intermittent depressurization vents that drain player health

pickup.name: EMP Shock Charge
pickup.effect: Disables active kinetic energy shielding for a short duration

encounters.trigger: A security override in the terminal unlocks the path to the Hydroponics Bay, triggering a security alert there

enemy.name: Bio-Mutated Sentry
enemy.weakness: EMP Shock Charge which shorts out its internal targeting array

encounters.hazard: Toxic spore clouds that blur vision and inflict damage over time

pickup.name: Supercharged Plasma Core
pickup.effect: Unleashes a massive thermal discharge when overloaded

encounters.trigger: Sensing the destruction of the Sentry, the ship's automated backup systems route power to the main reactor core

encounters.hazard: Unstable reactor radiation beams sweeping across the platform

pickup.name: Singularity Matrix Override
pickup.effect: Forces localized spatial gravity fields to collapse on command

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the primary containment field sounds an emergency alarm, unlocking the bridge elevator for the final ascent

boss.name: A.I. Overseer Prime
boss.weakness: Singularity Matrix Override which collapses the A.I. mainframe core shields
boss.victory_condition: Initiate the singularity collapse on the core mainframe while remaining undetected using shadow stealth abilities

level.objective: Infiltrate the derelict ship, bypass the corrupted security network, and neutralize the rogue ship intelligence before it fires its superweapon
level.reward: The legendary Eclipse Shroud armor module and safe passage out of the dying sector

level.setting: The abandoned hydroponics deck of the generation ship 'Aetheris', overrun by bioluminescent fungal mutations and corrosive dampness.

encounters.hazard: Leaking cryo-fluid pipes that freeze movement on contact.

pickup.name: Concentrated Nitroglycerin Extract
pickup.effect: Modifies the next weapon fire into an explosive concussive burst.

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the nursery security lock activates the automated tram, opening the path to Bay B.

encounters.hazard: Pockets of highly combustible methane gas hanging in the air.

pickup.name: Phosphorescent Phytotoxin
pickup.effect: Coats the weapon to disrupt cellular regeneration in organic targets.

encounters.trigger: Overloading the pressure valve of the processing tank floods the chamber, forcing the player into the ventilation shafts leading to Bay C.

encounters.hazard: Eroded metal grates that collapse into acid-dripping sub-floors.

pickup.name: Alchemical Catalyst-Omega
pickup.effect: Unlocks the ultimate elemental fusion attack when combined with weapon payload.

encounters.trigger: Unlocking the main laboratory vault door releases the containment field of the core entity.

boss.name: The Great Spore-Heart Prime
boss.victory_condition: Inject the Alchemical Catalyst-Omega into the central life-support conduit to trigger a localized molecular collapse of the organism.

level.objective: Purge the sentient fungal entity infesting the hydroponics deck and secure the seed vault.
level.reward: The Legendary Alchemist Schematic: Voidfire Catalyst, granting permanent corrosive-burning properties to all projectiles.

level.setting: The Bubble-Wrap Nebula's Neon Bounce Palace

encounters.hazard: Fizzy soda geysers that cause bouncy sliding

pickup.name: Sticky Honey-Syrup Blaster
pickup.effect: Slows down fast-moving entities and sticks to fluffy surfaces

encounters.trigger: A sticky trail of syrup leads the player directly through the ventilation shaft to the next room.

encounters.hazard: Spinning disco ball lasers that cause temporary confusion

pickup.name: Retro Static Feather Duster
pickup.effect: Generates a massive static electricity charge

encounters.trigger: Defeating the squirrel causes a generator to short-circuit, opening the blast door to the control lounge.

encounters.hazard: Slippery banana-peeled tiles on the conveyor belts

pickup.name: Jar of Super-Slippery Micro-Bots
pickup.effect: Coats surfaces in friction-free quantum oil

encounters.trigger: A trapdoor under the vinyl player opens, dropping the player into the central core for the final showdown.

boss.name: The Great Inflatable Robo-Hamster
boss.victory_condition: Lubricate the robo-hamster's exercise wheel with the Micro-Bots, causing it to spin uncontrollably and eject its power core.

level.objective: Retrieve the stolen Golden Disco Ball from the hyperactive robo-hamster to restore the nebula's dance party vibes.
level.reward: The legendary 'Boots of Infinite Bouncing' and a lifetime supply of cosmic pop-rocks.

level.setting: The Whispering Gardens of Kepler-186f, a crystalline botanical sanctuary hanging in the upper atmosphere.

encounters.hazard: Shifting tectonic walkways with no guardrails.

pickup.name: Superconductive Amethyst
pickup.effect: Enhances weapon frequency output by a factor of three.

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Superconductive Amethyst into the ancient garden console opens the bridge to the Obsidian Terraces.

encounters.hazard: Floating razor-sharp volcanic ash clouds.

pickup.name: Liquid Helium Geode
pickup.effect: Releases an instant sub-zero flash freeze upon impact.

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Sentinel's core destabilizes the terrace, opening a thermal elevator shaft down to the Deep Geodesic Vault.

encounters.hazard: Ruptured high-pressure supercooled gas vents.

pickup.name: Bismuth Gravity Well
pickup.effect: Generates a localized, hyper-dense gravity vortex.

encounters.trigger: Using the Bismuth Gravity Well to stabilize the collapsing vault door opens the pathway to the Core of the World Tree.

boss.name: The Singularity Overlord, Aeon-9
boss.victory_condition: Deploy the Bismuth Gravity Well inside Aeon-9's containment field to collapse its singularity engine.

level.objective: Sooth the corrupted planetary engine to prevent the destruction of Kepler-186f's fragile ecosystem.
level.reward: The Core of the World Tree, unlocking the ultimate Geotectonic Mastery subclass.
